page_content:
Prerequisite: TLPL693.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDPS837 or TLPL862.

Formerly: EDPS837.

TLPL868 Seminar in Teacher Education and Professional Development (1 Credit)

This course brings together graduate students and faculty who have interest in research and practical topics related to teacher education and professional development, to discuss current research, discuss problems of practice, share emerging research with peers, and build a community of practice.
